name: Vanilla Wafers # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add well-beaten egg yolks, mixing thoroughly.
3. Sift together flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, salt, and vanilla into another bowl.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the egg mixture using a spatula until just combined.
5. Gradually fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until the dough is smooth and flows easily from a piping bag.
6. Knead in enough flour on a lightly floured surface to form a soft, pliable dough.
7. Turn out onto a lightly floured work surface and roll into a sheet about 1/8 inch thick.
8. Cut with a floured cutter to desired shape.
9. Place the cut wafer pieces onto a baking sheet lightly coated with oil.
10. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) for approximately 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
50 servings.
